comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--improve-gitignore
comments.content: Plan: Add gitignore generation to crosslink init. Key changes: (1) Add a write_root_gitignore() function that manages a marked section in root .gitignore with entries for .crosslink/ machine-local state and .claude/ auto-generated files. Use section markers (# === Crosslink managed ===) for idempotent replacement on re-init. (2) Update the existing .crosslink/.gitignore generation to include all machine-local files (issues.db*, session.json, daemon.pid, .cache/). (3) Add 'DO track' comments explaining what IS committed. (4) Add tests for fresh creation, idempotent re-init, and preserving user entries.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--improve-gitignore
comments.content: Completed: Added write_root_gitignore() to init.rs with section-marker-based idempotent gitignore management. Covers .crosslink/ machine-local state and .claude/ auto-generated dirs. Updated .crosslink/.gitignore to include integrations/. 8 new tests. All tests pass, clippy clean. Committed as b3d736e.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--improve-gitignore
comments.content: Feature complete. Committed b3d736e. .kickoff-status written. Ready for PR.
